title: Morningstar
description: Adds a new weapon called the Morningstar, with 3 new enchantments just for it, and a new tipping mechanic.
body:
Adds a new Morningstar weapon, with 3 enchantments for it, and a new mechanic that lets you tip the morningstar with items.

# The Morningstar
The Morningstar is a slow, but heavy hitting weapon, made to fight other players.
![the morningstar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdcb741ca7b50d0f832e1706edee3fb5ef11933b_0.webp)
# The Ironstar
Weaker but faster variant of the Morningstar, which is also cheaper to make, and doesnt have some enchantments.
# The Enchantments
## Fangs
Pulls up Spikes from the ground in a 3x3 area that damages players in it.
## Siphon
Deals an extra half heart of damage that bypasses armor, and has a 25% chance to heal half a heart of health when hitting something.
## Smashing
Launches the enemy 4 blocks into the air, and goes on cooldown for 5 seconds.
{currently doesnt work for players, sorry}

# Tipping
While holding an item in your offhand, you can right click with your Morningstar to apply an effect to your next hit.
## Tipping items
### Glow Dust
Applies the Glowing and Blindness effect to the enemy on your next hit.
### Flint and Steel
Sets the enemy on fire.
### Lightning Rod
Strikes Lightning on the enemy on your next hit.
### Wither Skull
Applies the Withering effect to the enemy on your next hit.
